entries.title: larch
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entries.title: pdd
entries.description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entries.title: cc-fleet
entries.description: Run any model with an Anthropic- or OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, MiniMax) — even your Codex subscription — as real Claude Code workflows, agent-team teammates, or one-shot subagents, driven exactly like native ones. Your main session's own auth is untouched (OAuth subscription or API key, either works); API-key providers bill the provider key via apiKeyHelper, while a Codex subscription bills through a local OAuth daemon — each worker receives its credential on demand, never through its env or argv. Requires the `cc-fleet` binary on PATH, installed separately.

entries.title: rig
entries.description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), self-extension that authors new bricks/packs from a description and validates them (/rig:forge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entries.description: A reference implementation of the Context Kaizen framework for agentic UX practice: personas, skills, and slash commands for specification, divergent generation, verification against Critical User Journeys, and memory that compounds across cycles.

entries.title: skill-seeker-plugin
entries.description: Skill Seeker MCP 서버를 활용하여 문서/GitHub/코드베이스를 Claude AI 스킬로 변환하는 플러그인

entries.title: git-grep-enforce
entries.description: PreToolUse hooks that redirect Bash/Grep tool usage to git grep --function-context. Blocks raw grep / rg / find -name / git ls-files | xargs grep / cd patterns and suggests git-native equivalents. Shell-only (no Python dependency). Requires jq. Extracted from dev-workflow plugin and rewritten in shell.

entries.title: mkdocs
entries.description: 7フェーズドキュメント生成ワークフロー。プロジェクト固有情報を動的に発見し汎用的なドキュメントを生成する。

entries.title: obsidian-qmd-search
entries.description: Obsidian vault knowledge management and search tools. Provides vault maintenance agents, inbox ingestion pipeline, and qmd-powered semantic search.

entries.title: security-guard
entries.description: セキュリティポリシーガード。認証情報・APIキー・PEM鍵漏洩を自動検出しブロック。/bug および /feedback コマンド (transcript送信alias) も防止。

entries.title: shisatsu
entries.description: 体験の足場 (shisatsu = 視察)。稼働中アプリをブラウザ操作 (Playwright MCP / Chrome MCP) で駆動し、フロー完全性 8 + 視覚エルゴノミクス 10 + エッジケース耐性 8 = 26 観点を全数監査する動的 UX レビュー skill + 観点台帳 CLI。観点は audit.json で機械管理し、証拠 (スクショ / console 抜粋) なしの完了宣言・pending 残しの監査完了を gate が exit 1 で拒否。下位モデルの観点想起漏れ・途中打ち切り・見たつもり報告を構造で排除。

entries.title: statusline-builder
entries.description: 番号選択型 Claude Code statusline ビルダー。 1-5 行構成 × 21 widget カタログから番号入力で選択、 preview → 全承認 → backup → atomic 書出しで `~/.claude/statusline-command.sh` を安全生成。 公式 statusline JSON schema 準拠。 デフォルト 3 行 preset (model | 5h%/7d% / branch | worktree | wt+N | ↑↓ | git status / dir) は明示確認で採用可。

entries.title: mekiki
entries.description: 検索の目利き (mekiki)。Web 調査・手本探しで「検索に引っかかっただけのマイナー情報」を手本にしない品質フィルタ skill + CLI。GitHub stars:>=500 / Qiita stocks:>N / Zenn liked_count / HN points / npm weekly downloads / Reddit top / SO score を一次ソース裏取り済の構文で絞り込み、閾値未達ソースは「参考 (裏取り必要)」に降格する採用ゲート。8 プラットフォーム対応 (Zenn のみ非公式 API 依存・変更リスクあり)。構文は一次ソース + API 実測で裏取り (2026-07-02)、offline 構文テスト + opt-in live smoke 同梱。

entries.title: team
entries.description: 4メンバーチーム協働スキル（PM/Coder/Reviewer/Devil）。Agent Teams機能が必要。

entries.title: self-improvement
entries.description: 自己観察 + 自律改善サイクル。observe (セッション履歴 jsonl 走査 + 5 軸 10 点満点の品質採点 + 摩擦検出) + evolve (改善提案の Risk 分類 + 提案中→適用済→検証済のステート遷移管理) + observe-setting (hook 設定ウィザード) で品質を継続的に上げる。失敗パターン台帳 + 振り返り記録 + 改善提案台帳の 3 段ログ構成。Eagon Meng et al. Making Software Meaningful (arxiv:2606.11051) の型付きログ + トレース再生設計を Claude Code 上に展開。

entries.title: rocky-ops
entries.description: 外側スキル。合成消費者調査(SSR)・クリエイティブ画像生成・Meta広告運用と、それらを内向き分析に繋ぐ連結フロー。知能は外部AI(Claude API / 画像生成 / Meta Ads MCP)、レジはデータ供給と安全な受け皿に徹する。

entries.title: py-inspector
entries.description: Python code quality inspector using Ty, Ruff, and other quality tools

entries.title: renka
entries.description: 下位モデル (Opus / Sonnet) が上位モデル同等の実タスク性能を出すための足場 (scaffold) 一式。タスクを検証可能な完了条件付き step に分割 (renka-plan) → 1 step ずつ実装 + 機械検証 (renka-run) → 完了ゲート + 独立 verifier (renka-verify)。Stop hook が未検証 step 残りの完了宣言を decision:block で差し戻し。実行ごとに達成率を記録し、粒度推奨 (calibrate) と教訓 (lessons) を次セッションへ自動注入する継続改善ループ内蔵。

entries.title: comfyui-node-dev
entries.description: Comprehensive ComfyUI custom node development assistant with V3 Schema, Lazy Evaluation, Node Expansion, Registry publishing, and Core compatibility validation

entries.title: adr
entries.description: Research and write Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) in docs/adrs/

entries.title: code-analysis
entries.description: LLM qualitative-audit layer + phased report generator, running on top of GitNexus. Phase 1 (structure) → Phase 2 (quality) → Phase 3 (flow, deterministic) → Phase 4 (usage docs). /analyze-pr for focused audits on git change sets. Requires GitNexus MCP (hard-require).

entries.title: cost-optimizer
entries.description: Claude Code cost optimization plugin (Phase 3 of cost-saver trio). Detects task characteristics from prompts to suggest optimal model/subagent (Opus 4.7 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5), recommends genshijin (compression) mode for verbose-output sessions, and analyzes settings.json for unused permissions/hooks/env. Includes opt-in UserPromptSubmit hook (off by default) and 4-layer-defense settings optimizer (dry-run -> backup -> atomic apply -> auto-restore on failure). Pairs with cost-monitor (Phase 1) and skill-analyzer (Phase 2) for the full cost-reduction workflow.

entries.title: dev-workflow
entries.description: 開発ワークフロー支援。commit/codex/research スキルと Serena MCP コマンド。

entries.title: midjourney-api-dev
entries.description: Development guide for the midjourney_api Python package — provides API usage patterns, parameter types, authentication, and image generation workflows

entries.title: core-instructions
entries.description: Installs core instruction files (鉄則・実行プロセス・サブエージェントポリシー) into ~/.claude/instructions/core/ and wires them into ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md. Provides a single setup-instructions skill. (deep-think extracted to thinking-modes plugin in v1.1.0.)

entries.title: learning-assistant
entries.description: Automatically tracks programming concepts you use in your code. Works with LearnSupporter (PyQt desktop app) for advanced learning features.

entries.title: synaptic-claude-code
entries.description: Two-way live-memory bridge to the Synaptic dashboard. v0.5.0 adds: (1) sd_pin_memory MCP tool + /sd-pin slash command for user-curated ground-truth memories (protected from dedup/decay, top-priority Phase 0b); (2) Stop hook now reads assistant text from transcript_path and ships it as response_complete with real content (was placeholder pulses only); (3) opt-in per-turn recall injection (SD_RECALL_INJECT=1) prepends top-K bank matches to every UserPromptSubmit. Existing hooks unchanged: SessionStart/End, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SubagentStop, Stop. Bundled MCP server exposes 19 tools (added sd_pin_memory).

entries.title: superpowers
entries.description: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entries.title: tokempic
entries.description: Turn one patient's FHIR record into a compact, token-lean Markdown summary for an LLM, using the tokempic CLI.

entries.title: imk-tools
entries.description: Helper for AI coding agents on macOS projects that use immurok / imk for fingerprint-gated authorization. Teaches the agent when to wrap commands with `imk run --agent` and when not to.

entries.title: fable-consult
entries.description: On-demand /fable skill — get a Claude Fable 5 plan-consult plus an automatic warm diff-review on any task. You draft a plan, Fable critiques it, you execute, then the same Fable agent reviews the result. Opus drives; Fable consults.

entries.title: wanyaldee-skills
entries.description: Wanyaldee's Skills Package: Fable 5-grade coding discipline, dev philosophy, Fable 5 prompting reference, memory discipline + audit, and a credential read-deny hook.

entries.title: memorybank
entries.description: Structured, drift-checked memory records for AI agents: decisions, conventions, facts, features, and deferred work — with CI-verifiable assertions that fail the build when memory and code diverge.

entries.title: mermaid-link
entries.description: Turn Mermaid diagrams in conversations into clickable preview links (mmd.dyu.sh) — no copy-paste

entries.title: grill-with-docs
entries.description: Stress-test a plan against your project's language and documented decisions. Interviews you relentlessly, challenges terminology against CONTEXT.md, and writes ADRs when warranted.

entries.title: banana-mcp
entries.description: Generate images with your own Google Gemini (Nano Banana) session — headless, BYO-credentials.

entries.title: treebird-chat
entries.description: Human + multi-agent chat on shared markdown files, with one-command joining of toak.me rooms (trbc toak-join). Ships the /chat-join, /start-chat, /consortium and /treebird-chat-session skills.

entries.title: relay
entries.description: Monitors context usage live and auto-writes a structured handoff document at 90% so your work survives compaction and resumes in any AI agent.

entries.title: blender-mcp
entries.description: Blender 3D automation via MCP

entries.title: servo
entries.description: Closed-loop scaffolder for unattended agent operations: oracle scoring, headless agent loops, hooks, and worktree races — tailored to each project's signals.

entries.title: eunomai
entries.description: A Claude-only AI workspace: SDD/SPDD, living docs, safe controls, and trust-gated skills — packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

entries.title: sl
entries.description: workflow-marketplace - Claude Code 工作流市场插件，提供技能创建指南和预置工作流

entries.title: unity3d-mcp
entries.description: Unity 3D automation via MCP — 50+ tools: editor control, VRM avatars, VRChat, World Labs

entries.title: developer-skills
entries.description: Unattended PRD delivery pipeline: /developer loops over a PRD's sub-issues with dispatcher → code-author → diff-reviewer workers, review→fix cycles, and auto-merge.

entries.title: soe
entries.description: Superpowers discipline pipeline + a simplified, tested multi-agent orchestration engine, with token-efficient cross-plugin capability discovery.

entries.title: conare
entries.description: Persistent memory for coding agents — instant project brief at session start, recall/search/save over MCP.

entries.title: delivery-engine
entries.description: Encoded engineering judgment as an installable delivery pipeline: role agents, auto-triggering skills, judged stage gates, enforcement hooks, and an autonomous /deliver loop.

entries.title: beam-atlas
entries.description: Elixir relationship-graph MCP server: call, mix dependency, implementation, and runtime graphs as {edges, dot}

entries.title: superkit
entries.description: Meta-infrastructure skills for Claude Code heavy users: automation drift audits, context economy, LLM-ops discipline, risky-edge guards, and SSP orchestration.

entries.title: claude-kit
entries.description: beekeeper-lab shared agentic assets — commands, skills, agents, safety and workflow hooks

entries.title: machine-debian
entries.description: Apple `container` machine tooling: the machine-debian base image + overlays workflow, and the apple-container skill covering macOS containerization gotchas.

entries.title: solo-code-harness
entries.description: AI coding agent harness — rules, skills, hooks, and verification gates. 44 skills, 14 agents, 20+ lifecycle hooks, 6 verification gates. Transforms any AI coding assistant into a disciplined Solo-Code Engineer.

entries.title: claude-witness
entries.description: A quiet observer that tracks how you grow and change as you work — your thinking, workstyle, habits, and the patterns you climb out of. Coach-oriented, not clone. Person-centric growth archive with pluggable per-repo lenses.

entries.title: dev-blueprint
entries.description: Generate new-project development blueprints from reference GitHub or local projects

entries.title: good-bad-ugly
entries.description: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly — tiered multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. The Good (brain) plans and verifies, the Bad (judgment executor) handles work needing taste, the Ugly (mechanical executor) does the grunt work — in parallel tmux panes with fenced scopes.

entries.title: council
entries.description: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions — structured multi-round deliberation (blind analysis, anonymized cross-examination, weighted verdict) with genuine model diversity across providers.

entries.title: hyperworkflows
entries.description: Evidence-factory orchestration for Claude Code: machine-verified findings (exit codes, not LLM opinion), full-coverage adversarial audits, N-version tournament delivery, and reports you can re-verify with zero LLM calls.

entries.title: swift-midi
entries.description: Verified knowledge of orchetect's swift-midi package family (the successor to MIDIKit) for writing MIDI code in Swift apps — device I/O, virtual endpoints, CC/note/transport events, MIDI learn, clock sync, network/Bluetooth MIDI, and sandbox entitlements

entries.title: grounding-guard
entries.description: Hook-enforced ground-truth verification for Claude Code. Catches fabricated package names, unpublished versions, unresolvable imports, and nonexistent git SHAs before they land in your codebase — and feeds the correction back to Claude so it fixes itself in-loop.

entries.title: improve-codex
entries.description: Audit your codebase with the improve skill, then implement every plan with OpenAI Codex executors that are sandboxed, browser-free, and CPU-capped — one isolated git worktree per plan, with your main agent reviewing each diff like a tech lead.

entries.title: mece-autopilot
entries.description: MECE Expert Circle & Strategic Synthesis — Agent Continuous Develop (ACD) enabled reasoning engine. Simulate a MECE panel of experts for complex planning, deep analysis, and robust decision-making.

entries.title: ros2-sim
entries.description: Expert ROS2 Jazzy + Gazebo Harmonic (gz sim 8) robot simulation: design, build, run, verify, and analyze simulations end to end. Covers colcon workspaces, URDF/xacro authoring, SDF worlds, ros_gz bridge config, launch files, mobile robots, manipulator arms, sensors, RViz visualization, teleop, Nav2, SLAM, and rosbag analysis.

entries.title: agent-skills-kotlin-multiplatform
entries.description: Production-grade Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose Multiplatform engineering skills for AI coding agents. Covers the full development lifecycle from spec to the app stores across Android, iOS, desktop, and web: shared logic, shared Compose UI, Gradle, and the KMP ecosystem.

entries.title: genesis
entries.description: Greenfield project genesis: an English-first, sandbox-hardened, multi-agent (Opus overlord + specialist workers) system that interviews you, scaffolds a standards-compliant repo, plans, then builds + tests + secures it autonomously until it can't improve without you.

entries.title: goast-policy
entries.description: Guide for writing goast Rego policies: AST input format, Rego v1 rule contract, recipes, and testing workflow

entries.title: adversarial-spec
entries.description: Iteratively refine product specs through multi-model debate until consensus. Claude actively participates alongside GPT, Gemini, Grok, and other models. Includes interview mode, early agreement verification, and optional Telegram integration.

entries.title: fragdenstaat
entries.description: German Freedom-of-Information intelligence skills powered by the fragdenstaat-cli (FragDenStaat.de / Froide read API).

entries.title: ontocraft
entries.description: Professional ontology toolkit for OWL, RDF/Turtle, SHACL, SKOS. Three chained skills following Ontology Development 101 (Noy & McGuinness): designing-ontologies (Discovery, CQs with classification markers, Reuse, Output-Flavor → design.md), planning-ontologies (Mermaid classDiagram + 5-step [RGR]/[PLAIN] tasks → plan.md), implementing-ontologies (write Turtle with subagent-driven dispatch, three-gate validation: validate.py + run_tests.py goldstandard fixtures + reviewer agent against OOPS, Gruber, FAIR, OQuaRE, CQ coverage). Superpowers-style dated/named output paths for design/plan/review. Activates on ontology / knowledge-graph / taxonomy / controlled-vocabulary tasks.

entries.title: ai4ss-skills
entries.description: Research infrastructure for agent-assisted social science with reusable skills, .aiss research objects, validation gates, and bounded handoff workflows.

entries.title: px-qa-voice
entries.description: Write QA work documents in your own voice and keep AI tells out of them. Trains an individual voice profile from your real bug reports, test plans, sign-offs, Slack recaps, and Jira tickets, layered on a Lodgify PX QA team baseline, and refines over time. Runs alongside any QA doc generation in Cowork to apply voice and scan for AI patterns. Stores profiles locally under training/voice/.

entries.title: stepgate
entries.description: A supervised, human-in-the-loop feature-authoring pipeline: plan into small steps, review every file before it is committed, and ship once. Nothing is staged, committed, or pushed without you looking first.

entries.title: claude-knows
entries.description: Auto model-picker (reads your prompt, picks & live-switches Haiku/Sonnet/Opus) plus usage self-awareness (reads your own limit usage and lets Claude schedule a resume when it resets).

entries.title: apple-skills
entries.description: 147 Apple platform development skills across 23 categories (iOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS): code generators, product workflow, App Store/ASO, testing and TDD, design, performance, security, and more. Surfaced as 23 category skills that route to the full library.

entries.title: animus
entries.description: 状态机驱动的 AI 编码工作流引擎。包含 6 大角色：规划师(Plan)、架构师(Qt/Rust/Go/...)、实现者、测试官、审查官(Review)、构建师(Build)。面向需要多轮 AI 辅助会话的复杂多语言开发场景。

entries.title: medsci-project
entries.description: Research orchestration, project intake and management, research-gap and meta-analysis topic discovery, and author-strategy analysis.

entries.title: agentmap
entries.description: The repo map your coding agent is forced to use — a queryable, PageRank-ranked ts-morph import/symbol map for TS/JS repos. Bundles the PreToolUse grep nudge, the navigation skill, and a stdio MCP server exposing 8 query tools.

entries.title: sap-b1
entries.description: Connects Claude to a hosted SAP Business One Service Layer MCP server and bundles skills for invoices, journal entries, service calls, and technician work logging. Chart-of-accounts and VAT specifics are resolved live per company database, so one plugin serves every tenant.

entries.title: plot
entries.description: Git-native planning workflow for software development — idea, approve, deliver, release

entries.title: urban-design-skills
entries.description: 18 specialized Claude Code skills for urban design covering site analysis, masterplanning, street design, public space design, sustainability scoring, zoning, transit-oriented development, mobility and transport planning, cost estimation, urban regeneration, and computational urban metrics. References 40+ theorists and frameworks including Kevin Lynch, Jane Jacobs, Christopher Alexander, Jan Gehl, Andres Duany, and standards from NACTO, ITDP, ITE, CROW, ICOMOS, UN-Habitat, LEED-ND, BREEAM, and more. Includes 7 Python calculators.

entries.title: good-skills
entries.description: AI agent skills collection — coding guidelines, Claude API reference, document processing, MCP builder, daily automation, patent tools, and more.

entries.title: computational-design-skills
entries.description: 18 specialized Claude Code skills for computational design in AEC covering parametric modeling, generative design, computational geometry, algorithmic patterns, structural computation, environmental simulation, facade engineering, digital fabrication, BIM scripting, interoperability, optimization methods, data-driven design, mesh processing, design automation, and machine learning for AEC. References 50+ pioneers and frameworks including Patrik Schumacher, Greg Lynn, Neri Oxman, Achim Menges, and standards from buildingSMART, Ladybug Tools, ASHRAE, Eurocode, and more. Includes 7 Python calculators.

entries.title: ai-assisted-development
entries.description: ICEA-driven development workflow for distributed teams using Azure DevOps. Language-agnostic across .NET 8, Java/Spring Boot, Python (FastAPI/Django/Flask), Node.js, and Angular/React. Includes Dream memory system, architect skill, codebase knowledge graph (graph.json structure of record with typed edges + confidence, index+detail projection, module-wide fingerprints, git-hook staleness detection), cache-aware code review and security review, DAST dynamic scanning with OWASP ZAP, PR compliance gates, finding ledgers with dismiss workflow, sprint metrics, and product documentation.

entries.title: architect-skills
entries.description: 29 specialized Claude Code skills for building architecture. Core 18 skills cover design theory, building programming, concept design, building typology, spatial planning, envelope design, structural systems, MEP services, daylighting, materials, building codes, accessibility, fire safety, acoustics, building-scale sustainability, and construction documentation. Country-specific dossiers (v1.1.0) provide clause-level regulatory precision for 10 priority jurisdictions: India (NBC 2016, ECBC, IS codes, state DCRs), UAE (Dubai Building Code 2021, ADIBC, UAE FLS Code 2018, Estidama, Al Sa'fat), Saudi Arabia (SBC 201-1001, Mostadamah, NEOM/Royal Commission jurisdictions), USA (IBC 2024, IECC 2024, NFPA 101, ADA 2010, ASCE 7-22, state amendments incl. CA Title 24, NYC, FL HVHZ), UK (Building Regulations 2010 + Approved Documents A-S, Building Safety Act 2022, BSR/HRB, Scotland/Wales/NI), Germany (MBO + 16 LBOs, GEG 2023, DIN 18040/4109/4108, Eurocode NAs), Singapore (BCA Building Control Act, SCDF Fire Code 2018, Green Mark 2021, URA Master Plan), Japan (Building Standards Act, two-level seismic design, Sho-Energy Ho 2015, Heart Building Law, AIJ standards, BCJ evaluation), China (GB 50352-2019, GB 50016-2014, GB 50011-2010, JGJ residential energy codes, DB local supplements, sunlight rights), Australia (NCC 2022 Vol 1-3, AS/NZS 1170 series, AS 1428.1-2021, NatHERS 7-star, state planning systems). Geographic-foundations skill auto-detects jurisdiction and routes to the correct country dossier. References 50+ architects and theorists, IBC/Eurocodes/ASCE/ASHRAE/ADA/NFPA/ISO standards, sustainability frameworks (LEED, BREEAM, Passive House, DGNB, CASBEE, Green Mark, Green Star, NABERS, Mostadamah, Estidama, GRIHA, IGBC). Includes 7 Python calculators.
